embeds.title: Lotan
embeds.description:
Lotan (Ugaritic: 𐎍𐎚𐎐 LTN, meaning "coiled"), also transliterated Lôtān, Litan, or Litānu, is a servant of the sea god Yam defeated by the storm god Hadad-Baʿal in the Ugaritic Baal Cycle.
Lotan seems to have been prefigured by the serpent Têmtum represented in Syrian seals of the 18th–16th century B

oh sorry, I guess I didn't make it too clear - Caro is the official, developer-designated English term for the realm (chosen specifically because Caro is the latin word for flesh)

the MTL putting Caro into random text is because modern MTL includes the ability to have a "terminology dictionary" where you can specify specific terms to be translated in a specific way (this is primarily used for character names, places, worldbuilding, etc), and basically what happened is putting Caro into that dictionary resulted in the MTL translating ALL instances of that word as Caro because it was specified as a special term, rather than being able to judge it contextually to determine if it was referring to the normal word or the realm
